description: Dedicated test scenarios for terraform_plan and terraform_validate validators. Each scenario declares the terraform code and the expected outcome for each validator independently.

schema.terraform_code: raw HCL code (no provider block — validators inject their own)
schema.notes: why the result is expected — useful for debugging mismatches

S01_valid_ec2_minimal.description: Minimal EC2 instance — bare minimum required attributes
S01_valid_ec2_minimal.notes: Both ami and instance_type are present — simplest possible valid config

S02_valid_ec2_with_tags.description: EC2 instance with tags and root_block_device
S02_valid_ec2_with_tags.notes: Full EC2 with nested block and tags — common real-world shape

S03_valid_s3_bucket.notes: S3 bucket resource — minimal and valid

S04_valid_security_group.description: Security group with ingress and egress rules
S04_valid_security_group.notes: Security group with multiple ingress/egress blocks — valid nested block usage

S05_valid_iam_role.description: IAM role with an assume-role policy document
S05_valid_iam_role.notes: IAM role using jsonencode — valid use of built-in function in attribute

S06_valid_multi_resource.description: EC2 instance referencing a security group (cross-resource reference)
S06_valid_multi_resource.notes: Terraform correctly resolves aws_security_group.allow_ssh.id at plan time; validate confirms the reference is structurally valid

S07_valid_ebs_volume.notes: EBS volume with gp3-specific attributes iops and throughput — all valid

S08_valid_stop_action.description: EC2 stop action via instance state resource
S08_valid_stop_action.notes: aws_ec2_instance_state drives stop/start actions — valid schema

S09_syntax_unclosed_brace.description: Missing closing brace — HCL parse error
S09_syntax_unclosed_brace.notes: HCL parser fails before schema checking — both validators reject immediately

S10_syntax_missing_equals.notes: HCL parse error on line 2 — equals sign is required between key and value

S11_syntax_unclosed_string.notes: String opened on line 2 is never closed — lexer error

S12_syntax_bad_block_header.description: Block header with wrong number of labels
S12_syntax_bad_block_header.notes: resource blocks require exactly two labels (type + name) — one label is a parse error

S13_schema_unknown_resource_type.description: Resource type that does not exist in the AWS provider
S13_schema_unknown_resource_type.notes: aws_magic_server is not a real resource — provider schema check fails at validate

S14_schema_unknown_attribute.description: Valid resource type but attribute does not exist
S14_schema_unknown_attribute.notes: banana_attribute is not in aws_instance schema — validate catches unsupported arguments

S15_schema_missing_required_ami.description: EC2 instance missing the required ami attribute
S15_schema_missing_required_ami.notes: ami is required for aws_instance — validate reports missing required argument

S16_schema_wrong_type_for_count.description: count meta-argument set to a string instead of a number
S16_schema_wrong_type_for_count.notes: count must be a whole number — string value 'three' is a type mismatch

S17_reference_undefined_resource.description: Reference to a resource that is never declared
S17_reference_undefined_resource.notes: aws_security_group.nonexistent is never declared — validate catches the dangling reference

S18_reference_undefined_variable.description: Reference to a variable that is never declared
S18_reference_undefined_variable.notes: var.ami_id and var.instance_type are not declared — validate reports undeclared variable

S19_plan_only_data_source.description: Data source lookup that validate passes but plan may fail on mock
S19_plan_only_data_source.notes: HCL is valid and schema is correct, but the data source requires LocalStack to return a real AMI — mocks typically return no results, causing plan to fail

S20_plan_only_nonexistent_subnet.description: EC2 in a subnet that doesn't exist in the mock
S20_plan_only_nonexistent_subnet.notes: subnet_id is a valid attribute with a valid-looking value — validate passes, but plan fails when provider cannot find the subnet in the mock VPC
